page.title: Double Negatives
page.subtitle_html: Double Negatives — коротка сторінка про подвійні заперечення в англійській мові.
page.subtitle_text: Double Negatives — коротка сторінка про подвійні заперечення в англійській мові.

blocks.body: {"level":"A1-B1","intro":"У стандартній англійській мові одне заперечення зазвичай достатнє: not any або no з affirmative verb.","rules":[{"label":"ONE NEGATIVE","color":"emerald","text":"Не поєднуємо not з nothing, nobody, never у стандартній формі.","example":"I do not know anything."},{"label":"NO + AFFIRMATIVE","color":"blue","text":"No, nobody, nothing, never вимагають affirmative verb.","example":"Nobody called."},{"label":"NOT + ANY","color":"amber","text":"Після not вживаємо any-forms.","example":"They did not invite anyone."}]}

{"title":"1. Основні форми","intro":"Порівняй стандартні способи уникати подвійного заперечення.","items":[{"label":"not any","title":"I do not know anything.","subtitle":"not + any"},{"label":"nothing","title":"I know nothing.","subtitle":"single negative"},{"label":"nobody","title":"Nobody called.","subtitle":"affirmative verb"},{"label":"never","title":"We never saw it again.","subtitle":"affirmative verb"}]}

{"title":"2. Використання","sections":[{"label":"Not + any","color":"emerald","description":"Після negative auxiliary вживаємо any-forms.","examples":[{"en":"I do not know anything.","ua":"Я нічого не знаю."},{"en":"They did not invite anyone.","ua":"Вони нікого не запросили."}]},{"label":"No-word + affirmative verb","color":"blue","description":"Nobody, nothing, no one, never уже заперечні.","examples":[{"en":"Nobody called.","ua":"Ніхто не телефонував."},{"en":"She said nothing.","ua":"Вона нічого не сказала."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Типові помилки","items":[{"label":"Помилка 1","color":"rose","title":"Not + nothing.","wrong":"I do not know nothing.","right":"I do not know anything."},{"label":"Помилка 2","color":"amber","title":"Nobody with negative verb.","wrong":"Nobody did not call.","right":"Nobody called."},{"label":"Помилка 3","color":"sky","title":"Never with another negative.","wrong":"We did not never go there.","right":"We never went there."}]}

{"title":"4. Короткий конспект","items":["Standard English usually uses one negative marker.","Use not + any instead of not + no-word.","Use nobody, nothing, no one with an affirmative verb.","Never usually already makes the clause negative.","Neither should not be combined with another negative."]}
